name: cloudflare-ddns
title: Cloudflare Dynamic DNS
description: Automatically detects your public IP and updates Cloudflare DNS records when it changes. Supports multiple subdomains and runs checks every 5 minutes. Perfect for home servers with dynamic IPs.

variables.name: CF_API_TOKEN
variables.label: Cloudflare API Token
variables.description: API token with DNS:Edit permissions for your zone

variables.name: CF_DDNS_SUBDOMAINS
variables.label: Subdomains to Update
variables.description: Comma-separated subdomains to keep updated (leave empty for root domain only). Example: @,www,traefik,ui

variables.name: CF_DDNS_PROXIED
variables.label: Cloudflare Proxy
variables.description: Enable Cloudflare proxy (orange cloud) on DNS records

variables.name: CF_DDNS_INTERVAL
variables.label: Check Interval (seconds)
variables.description: How often to check for IP changes
